overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a snowy, hazy forest during golden hour. The player first observes a large woolly mammoth creature up close before it moves away, then treks through deep snow encountering other survivor figures and navigating rocky, tree-filled terrain with atmospheric orange lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest clearing with large creature

events.description: woolly mammoth creature turns and begins walking away to the right
large mammoth creature moves out of frame to the right

agents.ego_description: standing still or moving slowly while watching the large mammoth creature in the clearing

notable_agents.action: large woolly mammoth turning and walking away into the forest

entered.detail: tall pine trees silhouetted against the orange hazy sky
grassy field with patchy snow cover and tall grass blades
snow-dusted rock formation to the right of the path

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a snowy forest clearing during a hazy golden hour. A massive woolly mammoth stands in the center before turning and walking away to the right, eventually exiting the frame. The ground is covered in patchy snow with tall grass, and evergreen trees stand silhouetted against the orange sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest trail with low sun

events.description: sun becomes visible through trees creating bright lens flare and strong backlighting
begin ascending a gentle slope through deeper snow

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the snow with a spear weapon visible in the lower right corner of the frame

entered.detail: bright sun shining through atmospheric haze and tree branches
leafless trees with white bark scattered among the evergreens
dark rocky cliff face emerging on the left side

segments.scene_description: Moving through the forest alone, the sun becomes visible as a bright disk through the haze, creating strong backlighting. The terrain gradually ascends through deeper snow, with white-barked deciduous trees appearing on the right and rocky outcrops emerging on the left.

events.description: two humanoid survivor figures appear in the distance ahead between the rocks
moving past the survivor figures who are walking through the snow

agents.ego_description: moving toward two distant figures while navigating between large rock formations in a narrow pass

notable_agents.action: two survivor figures in winter clothing walking ahead through the snowy canyon

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall covered in snow forming a canyon boundary
large boulder formation on the right side creating a narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a rocky canyon with high walls on both sides. Two survivor figures appear ahead walking through the snow. The camera approaches and passes them as they move through the confined space between the rock walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense dead forest with fallen timber

events.description: moving past the survivors into denser forest with dead trees
terrain becomes rougher with large fallen logs and deadwood

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense forest with dead trees and rocky terrain, moving away from the other figures

entered.detail: tall bare tree trunks without leaves, dark silhouettes against the sky
large downed tree trunk covered in snow blocking part of the path
scattered rocks and boulders dusted with snow

segments.scene_description: Leaving the rocky canyon behind, the scene transitions to a denser forest filled with dead standing trees and fallen logs. The ground is uneven with snow-covered boulders scattered about. The atmosphere remains hazy and orange as the camera moves deeper into the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy snowy forest that transitions from a close encounter with wildlife into a solitary ascent toward the sun. It begins in a clearing where a massive woolly mammoth stands amidst patchy snow and tall grass before turning and walking out of the frame to the right. As the camera moves forward into the forest, the orange sky deepens and the sun emerges as a bright disk through the haze, casting strong backlighting across the silhouetted evergreens. The scene then shifts as the terrain gradually ascends through deeper snow, with white-barked deciduous trees appearing on the right and rocky outcrops emerging on the left.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined rocky canyon into a dense, desolate wilderness. It begins by navigating a narrowing path between high stone walls, where the camera approaches and passes two survivor figures trekking through the snow. As the restrictive walls of the canyon recede, the scene opens into a thick forest characterized by dead standing trees and fallen logs. The camera then pushes deeper into this uneven terrain, moving past snow-covered boulders while the atmosphere remains bathed in a hazy, orange glow.
